subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-03
subcodes.first_line: I want to tell you that most of the nations and the majority of the people are in perfect ignorance. They are trying night and day
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action
